name: Before After
description: Side-by-side comparison section showing two states: without and with the product. Visualizes drift and inconsistency on one side versus consistency and alignment on the other. Useful for demonstrating value through contrast, with browser-frame mockups or card-based layouts.

browser-frames.description: Two-column grid comparing 'without' (left, warm/red gradient cards) and 'with' (right, cool/green gradient cards). Each column has a label and 3 stacked browser-frame mockups showing progressive states. Without-side shows drift: inconsistent layouts, varying spacing, mismatched components. With-side shows consistency: uniform structure, aligned elements. Includes a 'Zero Drift' pill badge on the with-side.

slots.without-label: Column label with _fs[0.85rem] _fw700 _uppercase _ls[0.08em] _mb4 _text[center], typically 'Without [Product]' in warm/red tone
slots.without-frames: 3 stacked browser-frame mockup cards with warm gradient background (coral to pink). Each card has: a browser chrome bar with 3 dots and a label, followed by mock content blocks (varying heights and widths to show inconsistency). Cards use _rounded[14px] _p5 _mb4. Each successive frame shows increasing drift in layout.
slots.with-label: Column label with _fs[0.85rem] _fw700 _uppercase _ls[0.08em] _mb4 _text[center], typically 'With [Product]' in cool/green tone
slots.with-frames: 3 stacked browser-frame mockup cards with cool gradient background (cyan to green). Each card has: a browser chrome bar with 3 dots and a label, followed by uniform mock content blocks (consistent heights and widths). Cards use _rounded[14px] _p5 _mb4. Includes a 'Zero Drift' Badge pill at the bottom: _inline _px4 _py1 _rounded[20px] _bggreen _fgdark _fs[0.72rem] _fw700 _uppercase.

split-cards.description: Two columns of simple comparison cards without browser chrome. Left column uses warm-toned cards with labels showing the 'before' state. Right column uses cool-toned cards with labels showing the 'after' state. Simpler visual treatment focused on content comparison rather than browser mockups.

slots.without-label: Column header label with warm color, uppercase, centered
slots.without-frames: Stacked Card components with warm gradient backgrounds, each containing a drift-label and mock content showing inconsistent layouts
slots.with-label: Column header label with cool color, uppercase, centered
slots.with-frames: Stacked Card components with cool gradient backgrounds, each containing a consistency-label and mock content showing uniform layouts. Includes Zero Drift Badge.
